# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that runs directly on the master node for faster execution. The pipeline performs builds, runs tests, and deploys to production. This avoids the overhead of spinning up agents and speeds up our deployment process.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
  agent { label 'master' }

  options {
    timestamps()
    ansiColor('xterm')
    disableConcurrentBuilds()
    skipDefaultCheckout(true)
    buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '30', daysToKeepStr: '30'))
  }

  environment {
    CI = 'true'
    DEPLOY_ENV = 'production'
  }

  stages {
    stage('Checkout') {
      steps {
        checkout scm
      }
    }

    stage('Build') {
      steps {
        sh '''
          set -euo pipefail
          if [ -f gradlew ]; then
            chmod +x gradlew
            ./gradlew clean assemble
          elif [ -f mvnw ]; then
            chmod +x mvnw
            ./mvnw -B -DskipTests clean package
          elif [ -f package.json ]; then
            npm ci
            npm run build
          else
            echo "No known build tool found (gradlew/mvnw/package.json)."
            exit 1
          fi
        '''
      }
    }

    stage('Test') {
      steps {
        sh '''
          set -euo pipefail
          if [ -f gradlew ]; then
            ./gradlew test
          elif [ -f mvnw ]; then
            ./mvnw -B test
          elif [ -f package.json ]; then
            npm test
          else
            echo "No known test tool found."
            exit 1
          fi
        '''
      }
      post {
        always {
          junit allowEmptyResults: true, testResults: '**/build/test-results/test/*.xml, **/target/surefire-reports/*.xml, **/target/failsafe-reports/*.xml'
        }
      }
    }

    stage('Deploy to Production') {
      when {
        allOf {
          branch 'main'
          expression { currentBuild.currentResult == 'SUCCESS' }
        }
      }
      steps {
        input message: 'Deploy to production?', ok: 'Deploy'
        sh '''
          set -euo pipefail
          if [ -x ./deploy.sh ]; then
            ./deploy.sh production
          else
            echo "Missing deploy script. Provide ./deploy.sh (executable)."
            exit 1
          fi
        '''
      }
    }
  }

  post {
    success {
      echo "Build #${env.BUILD_NUMBER} succeeded."
    }
    failure {
      echo "Build #${env.BUILD_NUMBER} failed."
    }
    always {
      cleanWs(deleteDirs: true, disableDeferredWipeout: true)
    }
  }
}
